allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Tailnet HTTPS end-to-end test ==="; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://desktop-2caj1dn.taile51bc0.ts.net:5184/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Content-Type: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)"; Write-Output "Length: $\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
